name: Argo CD (npx)
description: Interact with Argo CD applications through natural language: list and inspect applications, sync deployments, view managed resources, events, and logs. Connects to your Argo CD instance via API token.

inputs.label: Argo CD Base URL
inputs.description: The base URL of your Argo CD instance (e.g. https://argocd.example.com). The server connects to this endpoint's API.

inputs.label: Argo CD API Token
inputs.description: API token for an Argo CD account with apiKey capability. Generate it under Settings > Accounts for a local account that has the apiKey capability enabled.

obtain.instructions:
1. Ensure the target account has the 'apiKey' capability (set 'accounts.<name>: apiKey' in the argocd-cm ConfigMap)
2. In the Argo CD UI, go to Settings > Accounts
3. Select your account and click 'Generate New' under Tokens
4. (Optional) Set an expiration
5. Click 'Generate' and copy the token
Alternatively, run: argocd account generate-token --account <name>

auth.instructions: Generate an Argo CD API token under Settings > Accounts for an account that has the apiKey capability, or run 'argocd account generate-token'.
